world.title: Converging crises demand major pivots in global collaboration to protect vulnerable women, children, and adolescents
world.description: Converging crises are driving over 50% of maternal and child deaths into fragile settings. At a PMNCH dialogue, leaders urged a shift from reactive aid to locally led, resilient health systems, grounded in health sovereignty, sustainable financing, and accountability to protect women, children and adolescents.
world.source: PMNCH - Partnership for Maternal, Newborn and Child Health

business.title: BitsStrategy Launches a Free AI Stock Trading Bot to Help Users Capture Market Opportunities with Precision
business.description: NEW YORK, April 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BitsStrategy has launched a new free AI stock trading bot designed to help users identify market opportunities with greater precision and participate in stock trading through a simpler, more structured workflow. Built for users who want smarter support in fast-moving equity markets, the new release reflects growing demand for tools that can reduce guesswork, improve timing, and make stock trading more accessible.

business.title: BILD Announces the 2026 RenoMark Awards Winners
business.description: Toronto, April 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Building Industry and Land Development Association (BILD) announced the winners of the 2026 GTA RenoMark Awards today. Started in 1999, the awards recognize professional renovators and custom home builders who are members of BILD and the RenoMark program for their quality of work, innovation, customer service, and industry leadership.

ai.title: Quinnipiac Poll: AI in Colleges Gets Support, With Limits
ai.description: The survey found 74% of Americans say it is important for college and university students to learn how to use AI. But support drops when the technology moves from the classroom to decision-making: 59% oppose colleges using AI tools to screen new student applications, and 52% oppose schools using AI to tutor students.
